title: Eat Folate-Rich Foods
description: Include leafy greens, citrus fruits, and fortified cereals in your diet. Folate supports healthy egg development and reduces the risk of neural tube defects.

title: Practice Deep Breathing
description: Try 5 minutes of deep breathing exercises each morning. It lowers cortisol levels, reduces stress, and improves blood flow to reproductive organs.

title: Stay Hydrated
description: Drink at least 8 glasses of water daily. Proper hydration improves cervical mucus quality and supports overall reproductive health.

title: Moderate Exercise
description: 30 minutes of moderate exercise like walking or swimming can improve fertility outcomes. Avoid intense workouts that may stress the body.

title: Prioritize Sleep
description: Aim for 7-9 hours of quality sleep. Poor sleep disrupts hormone production, including those essential for ovulation and implantation.

title: Avoid Smoking & Alcohol
description: Both smoking and alcohol significantly reduce fertility in women and men. Quitting improves egg quality, sperm health, and IVF success rates.

title: Journal Your Journey
description: Writing down your thoughts and feelings can help process the emotional aspects of fertility treatment. It's a healthy outlet for stress and anxiety.

title: Healthy Fats Matter
description: Include avocados, nuts, seeds, and olive oil in your diet. Healthy fats support hormone production and reduce inflammation.
